offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inefficient tracking of depreciation causes late tax filings. We provide a fixed asset management system instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: Difficulty in tracking depreciation schedules and generating timely tax reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 assets
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
